---
title: "Educational Equity Project"
author: "Cynthia M."
format: html
---

---
title: "Data Preparation - Educational Equity Project"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: false
    toc: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Setup
```{r setup}
# Load packages
library(tidyverse)      # Data manipulation
library(readxl)         # Read Excel files
library(janitor)        # Clean names
library(skimr)          # Data summaries
library(naniar)         # Missing data viz
library(here)           # File paths

# Set theme for all plots
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))

# Custom color palette (colorblind-friendly)
project_colors <- c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#F0E442", 
                    "#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#CC79A7")
```

# Import Data
```{r import}
# Read 2019 data
pfi_2019 <- read_excel("pfi_data.xlsx", sheet = "2019")

# Read 2016 data  
pfi_2016 <- read_excel("pfi_data.xlsx", sheet = "2016")

# Check dimensions
cat("2019 data:", nrow(pfi_2019), "rows,", ncol(pfi_2019), "columns\n")
cat("2016 data:", nrow(pfi_2016), "rows,", ncol(pfi_2016), "columns\n")

# Check if column names match
all_match <- all(names(pfi_2019) == names(pfi_2016))
cat("\nColumn names match:", all_match, "\n")
```

# Variable Selection & Creation
```{r variable_selection}
# Select key variables for analysis
# (We'll expand this based on what we see in the data)

key_vars <- c(
  # Identifiers
  "BASMID",
  
  # Outcome variables
  "SEGRADES",        # Student grades (primary outcome)
  "SEGRADEQ",        # Work quality
  "SEENJOY",         # Enjoys school
  "SEABSNT",         # Days absent (Poisson outcome)
  "SEREPEAT",        # Grade repetition
  
  # School engagement frequency (Poisson outcome alternative)
  "FSFREQ",          # Times participated in school meetings
  
  # School engagement activities (individual indicators)
  "FSSPORTX",        # Attended school event
  "FSVOL",           # Volunteered
  "FSMTNG",          # Attended meeting
  "FSPTMTNG",        # PTA meeting
  "FSATCNFN",        # Parent-teacher conference
  "FSFUNDRS",        # Fundraising
  "FSCOMMTE",        # Committee
  "FSCOUNSLR",       # Guidance counselor
  
  # Homework involvement
  "FHHOME",          # Days per week doing homework
  "FHWKHRS",         # Hours per week on homework
  "FHCHECKX",        # Checks homework
  "FHHELP",          # Days help with homework
  
  # Cultural enrichment - weekly
  "FOSTORY2X",       # Told story
  "FOCRAFTS",        # Arts/crafts
  "FOGAMES",         # Board games
  "FOBUILDX",        # Projects
  "FOSPORT",         # Sports
  "FODINNERX",       # Family dinners
  
  # Cultural enrichment - monthly
  "FOLIBRAYX",       # Library
  "FOBOOKSTX",       # Bookstore
  "FOCONCRTX",       # Concert/play
  "FOMUSEUMX",       # Museum
  "FOZOOX",          # Zoo
  
  # Socioeconomic variables
  "TTLHHINC",        # Household income
  "PARGRADEX",       # Parent education (derived)
  "P2GUARD",         # Second parent present
  
  # School type
  "EDCPUB",          # Public school
  "EDCCAT",          # Private Catholic
  "EDCREL",          # Private religious
  "EDCPRI",          # Private non-religious
  
  # School choice
  "SCCHOICE",        # Has school choice
  "SPUBCHOIX",       # District allows choice
  "SCONSIDR",        # Considered other schools
  "SCHRTSCHL",       # Charter school
  "SCHLMAGNET",      # Magnet school
  
  # Student characteristics
  "ALLGRADEX",       # Current grade
  "CSEX",            # Sex
  "RACEETH",         # Race/ethnicity (derived)
  
  # Disability
  "DSBLTY",          # Has disability (derived)
  
  # Family structure
  "NUMSIBSX",        # Number siblings (derived)
  
  # Assistance programs (resource indicators)
  "HFOODST",         # Food stamps
  "HMEDICAID"        # Medicaid
)

# Select and add year indicator
pfi_2019_selected <- pfi_2019 %>%
  select(any_of(key_vars)) %>%
  mutate(survey_year = 2019)

pfi_2016_selected <- pfi_2016 %>%
  select(any_of(key_vars)) %>%
  mutate(survey_year = 2016)

# Stack datasets
pfi_combined <- bind_rows(pfi_2019_selected, pfi_2016_selected)

cat("Combined dataset:", nrow(pfi_combined), "rows,", 
    ncol(pfi_combined), "columns\n")
```

# Initial Data Inspection
```{r inspect}
# Look at first few rows
head(pfi_combined)

# Check structure
glimpse(pfi_combined)

# Summary statistics
skim(pfi_combined)
```

# Data Cleaning & Recoding
```{r cleaning}
pfi_clean <- pfi_combined %>%
  mutate(
    # ===== OUTCOME VARIABLES =====
    
    # Grades (1=Mostly A's, 2=B's, 3=C's, 4=D/F's, 5=No grades)
    # Exclude "no grades" responses
    grades_cat = case_when(
      SEGRADES == 1 ~ "High_Achievers",
      SEGRADES == 2 ~ "Solid_Performers", 
      SEGRADES == 3 ~ "Struggling",
      SEGRADES == 4 ~ "At_Risk",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    grades_cat = factor(grades_cat, 
                       levels = c("High_Achievers", "Solid_Performers", 
                                 "Struggling", "At_Risk")),
    
    # Binary outcome: At-Risk indicator
    # At-risk if C's or worse AND (high absence OR doesn't enjoy school)
    at_risk = case_when(
      SEGRADES >= 3 & (SEABSNT > 10 | SEENJOY >= 3) ~ 1,
      SEGRADES <= 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    # Days absent (Poisson outcome) - keep as numeric
    days_absent = SEABSNT,
    
    # School meeting frequency (alternative Poisson outcome)
    meetings_attended = FSFREQ,
    
    # ===== SCHOOL ENGAGEMENT ACTIVITIES =====
    # Recode from 1=Yes, 2=No to 1=Yes, 0=No
    across(c(FSSPORTX, FSVOL, FSMTNG, FSPTMTNG, FSATCNFN, 
             FSFUNDRS, FSCOMMTE, FSCOUNSLR),
           ~case_when(
             .x == 1 ~ 1,
             .x == 2 ~ 0,
             TRUE ~ NA_real_
           ),
           .names = "{.col}_binary"),
    
    # Create school engagement composite (count of activities)
    school_engagement = rowSums(
      select(., ends_with("_binary")), 
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    # ===== HOMEWORK INVOLVEMENT =====
    # Standardize and create composite
    homework_involvement = scale(
      rowMeans(
        select(., FHHOME, FHWKHRS, FHHELP), 
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
    )[,1],
    
    # ===== CULTURAL ENRICHMENT =====
    # Recode monthly activities (1=Yes, 2=No to 1/0)
    across(c(FOLIBRAYX, FOBOOKSTX, FOCONCRTX, FOMUSEUMX, FOZOOX),
           ~case_when(
             .x == 1 ~ 1,
             .x == 2 ~ 0,
             TRUE ~ NA_real_
           ),
           .names = "{.col}_binary"),
    
    # Weekly activities (already in good format mostly)
    # FODINNERX is 0-7, others need recoding from 1/2 to 1/0
    across(c(FOSTORY2X, FOCRAFTS, FOGAMES, FOBUILDX, FOSPORT),
           ~case_when(
             .x == 1 ~ 1,
             .x == 2 ~ 0,
             TRUE ~ NA_real_
           ),
           .names = "{.col}_binary"),
    
    # Create cultural enrichment composite
    # Weight monthly activities less than weekly
    cultural_enrichment = rowSums(
      select(., FOSTORY2X_binary, FOCRAFTS_binary, FOGAMES_binary, 
             FOBUILDX_binary, FOSPORT_binary), 
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) + 
    (rowSums(
      select(., ends_with("YX_binary")), 
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) / 4) +  # Monthly activities weighted as 1/4 week
    (FODINNERX / 7),  # Dinners as proportion of week
    
    # ===== SOCIOECONOMIC VARIABLES =====
    
    # Income (categorical - check actual coding in data)
    income_level = factor(TTLHHINC, 
                         ordered = TRUE),
    
    # Simplify to 3 categories if needed
    income_3cat = case_when(
      TTLHHINC <= 3 ~ "Low",
      TTLHHINC <= 6 ~ "Middle",
      TTLHHINC > 6 ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    income_3cat = factor(income_3cat, 
                        levels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"),
                        ordered = TRUE),
    
    # Parent education (check coding)
    parent_education = factor(PARGRADEX, ordered = TRUE),
    
    # Two-parent household
    two_parent = case_when(
      P2GUARD == 1 ~ 1,
      P2GUARD == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    # Private school indicator
    private_school = case_when(
      EDCPUB == 1 ~ 0,
      EDCCAT == 1 | EDCREL == 1 | EDCPRI == 1 ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    # Receives government assistance (indicator of need)
    receives_assistance = case_when(
      HFOODST == 1 | HMEDICAID == 1 ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    
    # ===== SCHOOL CHOICE =====
    has_school_choice = case_when(
      SCCHOICE == 1 | SPUBCHOIX == 1 ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    
    considered_other_schools = case_when(
      SCONSIDR == 1 ~ 1,
      SCONSIDR == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    charter_or_magnet = case_when(
      SCHRTSCHL == 1 | SCHLMAGNET == 1 ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    
    # ===== STUDENT CHARACTERISTICS =====
    grade_level = ALLGRADEX,
    
    male = case_when(
      CSEX == 1 ~ 1,
      CSEX == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    race_ethnicity = factor(RACEETH),
    
    has_disability = case_when(
      DSBLTY == 1 ~ 1,
      DSBLTY == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    num_siblings = NUMSIBSX,
    
    # Survey year as factor
    year = factor(survey_year)
  )

# Select final analysis variables
pfi_analysis <- pfi_clean %>%
  select(
    # ID
    BASMID,
    
    # Outcomes
    grades_cat, at_risk, days_absent, meetings_attended,
    
    # Engagement composites
    school_engagement, homework_involvement, cultural_enrichment,
    
    # Socioeconomic
    income_level, income_3cat, parent_education, two_parent,
    private_school, receives_assistance,
    
    # School choice
    has_school_choice, considered_other_schools, charter_or_magnet,
    
    # Student characteristics  
    grade_level, male, race_ethnicity, has_disability, num_siblings,
    
    # Year
    year
  )

# Remove rows with missing outcome
pfi_analysis <- pfi_analysis %>%
  filter(!is.na(grades_cat))

cat("Final analysis dataset:", nrow(pfi_analysis), "observations\n")
```

# Save Cleaned Data
```{r save}
# Save as RDS for easy loading
saveRDS(pfi_analysis, "pfi_analysis_data.rds")

cat("Data saved \n")
```

# Quick Summary
```{r summary}
# Summary of key variables
summary(pfi_analysis %>% select(grades_cat, at_risk, school_engagement,
                                income_3cat, parent_education))

# Missing data visualization
vis_miss(pfi_analysis, warn_large_data = FALSE)
```
